name: Growmon (Orange)

signature_move.name: Exhaust Flame
signature_move.description: Breathes out a scorching burst of flames with a roar.

description: A Growmon that became an orange-colored Data-type. Compared to the Virus-type, its usual personality is calmer, but it will quickly become agitated if something occurs. Its Special Move is spewing out a powerful blaze with a roar ( Exhaust Flame ).
